goal: Wire gad-tui.exe into .github/workflows/release-binaries.yml CI pipeline. Today scripts/build-bun-release.mjs (local) inline-invokes 'pnpm --filter @magicborn/gad-tui build:bun' but CI release workflow does not. Result: tag-push releases ship gad.exe without gad-tui.exe; users who install via gh release download get a broken 'gad tui' command. Action: (1) read current .github/workflows/release-binaries.yml to understand matrix + build steps, (2) add gad-tui build step (pnpm --filter @magicborn/gad-tui build:bun with correct target per matrix platform), (3) upload gad-tui-v<ver>-<platform>.exe as release asset alongside gad-v<ver>-<platform>.exe, (4) test via workflow_dispatch with a real tag before relying on it, (5) update CLI's gad self install to reference the new artifact naming if needed. Fixes gap identified in install/update review 2026-04-22.
